locations.clearing: You come to in a cold clearing. Dew on flattened grass, a silence that has not decided about you yet, and the fading memory of falling. There is no hazard here. A gap in the trees opens onto a forest path to the north.
locations.forest_path: A forest path threads north under bare branches. The treeline stands at your back like a held breath. A narrow track breaks off toward the sound of still water; ahead, the woods thin toward a gate.
locations.still_pond: A still pond lies just off the path, dark and unmoving, holding the whole sky without comment. Your own face waits at its surface, should you care to look.
locations.gate: The forest gives way to a stone gate set in the Duchy wall. A guard stands in a pool of lamplight, bored and patient, and has not yet decided to look up.

wait: You wait. Six in-world seconds turn without you.
idle: Nothing here has an opinion about you yet.
won: The guard studies you a moment, then grunts and stands aside. You pass beneath the stone gate. You are inside the walls.

telegraphs.1: Somewhere off through the trees, a howl — distant, almost decorative.
telegraphs.2: Rustling in the brush now, closer. The howl comes again, and this time it is not decorative.
telegraphs.3: A low growl, sourced disturbingly nearby, threads under everything else.

grappled: The wolf breaks from the treeline and hits you at a run. Teeth on one wrist, then the other, and your legs buckle under its weight — it has you. Tear free, and be quick.
struggle: You wrench a limb against the wolf's grip. It gives, barely.
freed: One last heave and you break loose. The wolf circles once, then slinks back past the treeline, unhurried.

observations.eye_color: The pond settles to a mirror. Your reflection meets you, and your eyes are, unmistakably, {value}. Fix it in memory — somewhere ahead, someone will ask, and will not ask twice.
observations.self: You take stock of yourself: two arms, the right count of fingers, a scout's frame the Duchy would burn on sight. Your hair is a plain travel-matted mess. Of your own eyes you can learn nothing here — no still surface holds them.

rejections.resource_conflict: Two claims land on one part of you at once. Nothing resolves; the round is handed back.
rejections.unknown_verb: You attempt something the world has no grammar for. It does not happen.
rejections.unknown_target: You reach for something that is not here.
rejections.unknown_resource: That is not a part of you that answers to orders.
rejections.illegal_move: There is no path that way.
